data.name: help
data.value: Elsa-Mina v{0}

data.name: youtube_no_results
data.value: Could not find any video.

data.name: dicoenglish_help
data.value: Look up an English word definition. Syntax: -dict <word>

data.name: dicoenglish_definition
data.value: Definition of "{0}": {1}

data.name: dicoenglish_not_found
data.value: No definition found for "{0}".

data.name: dicoenglish_suggestions
data.value: Word "{0}" not found. Did you mean: {1}?

data.name: dicoenglish_error
data.value: An error occurred while looking up the definition.

data.name: youtube_watch
data.value: Watch on YouTube

data.name: youtube_video_info
data.value: Uploaded by {0} on {1}

data.name: youtube_error_occurred
data.value: An error occurred.

data.name: youtube_help
data.value: Searches YouTube for a video. Syntax: -youtube <keywords>

data.name: bitcoin_error
data.value: An error occurred.

data.name: bitcoin_help
data.value: Shows the current Bitcoin price in EUR and USD.

data.name: dogecoin_error
data.value: An error occurred.

data.name: dogecoin_help
data.value: Shows the current Dogecoin price in EUR and USD.

data.name: ethereum_error
data.value: An error occurred.

data.name: ethereum_help
data.value: Shows the current Ethereum price in EUR and USD.

data.name: fact_error
data.value: An error occurred.

data.name: facts_help
data.value: Shows a random fun fact. Use -factde for a German fact.

data.name: wiki_page_not_found
data.value: No page could be found.

data.name: wiki_error
data.value: An error occurred while fetching page : {0}

data.name: wikipedia_help
data.value: Searches Wikipedia for a page. Syntax: -wikipedia <terms>

data.name: bulbapedia_help
data.value: Searches Bulbapedia for a page. Syntax: -bulbapedia <terms>

data.name: pokepedia_help
data.value: Searches Pokepedia for a page. Syntax: -pokepedia <terms>

data.name: pokemon_name_required
data.value: Please provide a Pokemon name.

data.name: afd_help
data.value: Shows the April Fools' Day sprite for a Pokémon. Syntax: -afd <pokemon>

data.name: dailymotion_watch_video
data.value: Watch on Dailymotion

data.name: dailymotion_no_video_found
data.value: No videos were found

data.name: dailymotion_help
data.value: Searches Dailymotion for a video. Syntax: -dailymotion <keywords>

data.name: dailymotion_fetch_error
data.value: An error occurred while fetching video : {0}

data.name: uptime
data.value: Uptime : {0}

data.name: changelog_error
data.value: An error occurred while fetching the changelog.

data.name: changelog_no_commits
data.value: No commits found.

data.name: genius_help_message
data.value: Fetch a song by its lyrics using Genius. Usage: -genius <lyrics>

data.name: genius_release_date
data.value: Released on: {0}

data.name: genius_page_views
data.value: Page Views: {0}

data.name: genius_link
data.value: Read lyrics on Genius

data.name: genius_not_found
data.value: Could not find any song from those lyrics or keywords.

data.name: rand_unsplash_help
data.value: Displays a random Unsplash image.

data.name: rand_help
data.value: Displays a random GIF from Tenor. Syntax: -rand [<search>]

data.name: randgif_help
data.value: Displays a random GIF from Tenor. Syntax: -randgif [<search>]

data.name: randmp4_help
data.value: Shows a random MP4 from Tenor. Syntax: -randmp4 [<search>]

data.name: randfurret_help
data.value: Displays a random Furret GIF.

data.name: randheart_help
data.value: Displays a random heart GIF.

data.name: randhelp_help
data.value: Lists all available random image commands.

data.name: walk_help
data.value: Displays an image in a marquee. Syntax: -walk <image_url>

data.name: random_image_error
data.value: Sorry, could not retrieve an image at the moment.

data.name: walk_missing_url
data.value: Please provide a valid image URL. Syntax: -walk <image_url>

data.name: rand_warning_snake
data.value: Warning! This image may include snakes which might not be suitable for all audiences.

data.name: rand_warning_spider
data.value: Warning! This image may include spiders which might not be suitable for all audiences.

data.name: rand_warning_shark
data.value: Warning! This image may include sharks which might not be suitable for all audiences.

data.name: rand_warning_mouse
data.value: Warning! This image may include mice which might not be suitable for all audiences.

data.name: googletranslate_help
data.value: Translates text. Syntax: -googletranslate <text>, <target language>[, <source language>]

data.name: googletranslate_error
data.value: An error occurred during translation.

data.name: badtranslate_help
data.value: Translates text through 10 random languages. Syntax: -badtranslate <text>

data.name: fullpot_help
data.value: Translates text through 10 random languages showing each step. Syntax: -fullpot <text>

data.name: pokemon_translate_help
data.value: Translates a Pokémon name into all available languages. Usage: -ptranslate <name>

data.name: pokemon_translate_not_found
data.value: No Pokémon found with the name "{0}".

data.name: randcustom_help
data.value: Executes a random custom command in the room.

data.name: randcustom_error
data.value: An error occurred while fetching a random custom command: {0}

data.name: help_bot_description
data.value: (v{0}) is a Pokémon Showdown bot.

data.name: help_commands_list
data.value: Available commands

data.name: help_source_code
data.value: Source Code

data.name: help_report_bug
data.value: Report a bug

data.name: help_command_help
data.value: Shows bot information and a list of available commands.

data.name: spoonacular_no_results
data.value: No recipes found.

data.name: spoonacular_error
data.value: An error occurred while fetching the recipe.

data.name: randcheese_help
data.value: Displays a random cheese recipe.

data.name: randpasta_help
data.value: Displays a random pasta recipe.

data.name: randrecipe_help
data.value: Displays a random recipe.

data.name: randsalad_help
data.value: Displays a random salad recipe.

data.name: randsoup_help
data.value: Displays a random soup recipe.

data.name: recipe_missing_query
data.value: Please provide a meal or ingredient to search for.

data.name: recipe_help
data.value: Searches for a recipe. Syntax: -recipe <ingredients or meal name>

data.name: pizza_invalid_number
data.value: Please provide a valid positive number of toppings.

data.name: pizza_too_many_toppings
data.value: Too many toppings requested.

data.name: pizza_help
data.value: Generates random pizza toppings. Syntax: -pizza [<count>]

data.name: salad_invalid_number
data.value: Please provide a valid positive number of ingredients.

data.name: salad_too_many_ingredients
data.value: Too many ingredients requested.

data.name: salad_help
data.value: Generates random salad ingredients. Syntax: -salad [<count>]

data.name: debilify_help
data.value: Converts text to random fancy unicode characters. Syntax: -debilify <text>

data.name: election_help
data.value: Simulates an election between candidates. Syntax: -election <candidate1>, <candidate2> [, ...]

data.name: evromaker_help
data.value: Transforms text in a random quirky style. Syntax: -evromaker <text>

data.name: weebify_help
data.value: Adds anime honorifics to words. Syntax: -weebify <text>

data.name: pairings_help
data.value: Generates random pairings from a list of players. Syntax: -pairings <player1>, <player2> [, ...]

data.name: ship_help
data.value: Calculates the compatibility between two users. Usage: -ship <user1>, <user2>

data.name: ship_result
data.value: 💘 {0} & {1} — compatibility: {2}% {3}

data.name: lolrank_help
data.value: Shows the League of Legends rank for a player. Syntax: -lolrank <gameName#tagLine>, [region]

data.name: lolrank_no_api_key
data.value: Riot API key is not configured.

data.name: lolrank_invalid_region
data.value: Unknown region: {0}. Valid regions: na1, euw1, eun1, kr, br1, la1, la2, oc1, tr1, ru, jp1

data.name: lolrank_player_not_found
data.value: Player not found: {0}

data.name: lolrank_error
data.value: An error occurred while fetching the rank.

data.name: lolrank_unranked
data.value: {0}#{1} is unranked.

data.name: lolrank_unranked_queues
data.value: Unranked

data.name: lolhistory_help
data.value: Shows the last 5 games for a player. Syntax: -lolhistory <gameName#tagLine> [region]

data.name: lolhistory_no_api_key
data.value: Riot API key is not configured.

data.name: lolhistory_invalid_region
data.value: Unknown region: {0}. Valid regions: na1, euw1, eun1, kr, br1, la1, la2, oc1, tr1, ru, jp1

data.name: lolhistory_player_not_found
data.value: Player not found: {0}

data.name: lolhistory_no_games
data.value: {0}#{1} has no recent games.

data.name: lolhistory_error
data.value: An error occurred while fetching match history.

data.name: lolhistory_header
data.value: Last 5 games for {0}#{1}:

data.name: lolhistory_win
data.value: W

data.name: lolhistory_loss
data.value: L
